title: Best stud finders | Bin Diving
description: AI-dug recommendations for best stud finders. Compare options and find one that fits.

recommendations.product_name: Franklin Sensors ProSensor M210 Stud Finder
cons: May show false positives on very uneven plaster

pros: Detects wood, metal and live wires
cons: Can be sensitive to electromagnetic interference

recommendations.product_name: Zircon StudSensor e50 Edge-Finding Stud Finder
cons: Finds edges not full stud center
Less effective on very thick or lath/plaster walls
